name: Daily Sales Metrics Email - Tier 1 Toy Example

nodes.name: Schedule: Every Weekday 8am
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Scheduled trigger - runs at predictable time, no external event required

nodes.name: Fetch Today's Meetings
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Deterministic API call - same endpoint, same parameters every time

nodes.name: Count Meetings
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Deterministic calculation - no AI, just counting and filtering

nodes.name: Fetch Pipeline Value
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Another deterministic API call - same query every day

nodes.name: Extract Pipeline Metrics
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Simple data transformation - extract and format only

nodes.name: Merge Data
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Deterministic merge - combine all data streams

nodes.name: Format Email
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Template-based email - same structure every time, just different numbers

nodes.name: Send Email
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Final action - send email with formatted data

nodes.name: Log Completion
nodes.notes: TIER 1 CHARACTERISTIC: Deterministic logging - same log structure every execution
